cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.21)

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Intelligence Matters - proprietary SKSE plugin (Phase 16)
# Stage A: validation plugin. Just writes a line to the SKSE log.
# Stage B: per-module infrastructure + Papyrus API (IMPlugin.GetVersion).
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

# SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the DLL version.
# These numbers feed three consumers:
#   1. The SKSE plugin version boilerplate (generated by add_commonlibsse_plugin)
#   2. The load log line
#   3. IMPlugin.GetVersion() / GetVersionString() on the Papyrus side (via Version.h)
# DLL version - INDEPENDENT of the mod version on Nexus.
project(
    IntelligenceMatters
    VERSION 1.0.0
    LANGUAGES CXX
)

# CommonLibSSE-NG requires C++23.
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 23)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Version.h generated from src/Version.h.in (Stage B.1).
# @ONLY: only expands @VAR@, ignores ${VAR} - keeps CMake from touching C++ code.
# Generated file goes to the binary dir (build artifact, not versioned).
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
configure_file(
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/Version.h.in"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/generated/Version.h"
    @ONLY
)

# Resolved via the vcpkg port (colorglass registry, see vcpkg-configuration.json).
find_package(CommonLibSSE CONFIG REQUIRED)

# add_commonlibsse_plugin creates the DLL target, wires up CommonLibSSE linkage,
# and auto-generates the SKSE version boilerplate (SKSEPlugin_Version).
# Output file will be IntelligenceMatters.dll.
add_commonlibsse_plugin(
    ${PROJECT_NAME}
    AUTHOR "Awrawra"
    SOURCES
        src/plugin.cpp
        src/Log.cpp
        src/Papyrus.cpp
        src/PluginInfo.cpp
)

target_compile_features(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE cxx_std_23)

# Where the generated Version.h is found by #include "Version.h".
target_include_directories(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/generated"
)

# PCH.h is mandatory for CommonLibSSE-NG. Force-included in every file of the
# target, it brings in the CommonLib headers before Relocation.h gets parsed.
# add_commonlibsse_plugin already applies /Zc:preprocessor and other required flags.
target_precompile_headers(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE src/PCH.h)

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Copies the DLL to the MO2 deploy mod after each build (Stage B).
#
# The "Intelligence Matters DLL" mod is NOT a worktree of anything - it's only
# a destination for the compiled artifact, outside git. Source lives in this
# worktree (plugin-skse); the compiled binary lives there. Never the other
# way around.
#
# Enabled in Stage B to remove manual copying: forgetting to copy makes the
# game load the stale DLL, and the resulting bug looks like a code issue.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
set(IM_OUTPUT_FOLDER "G:/Modlists/Skyrim Dev/mods/Intelligence Matters DLL/SKSE/Plugins")
if(DEFINED IM_OUTPUT_FOLDER)
    message(STATUS "DLL deploy folder: ${IM_OUTPUT_FOLDER}")
    add_custom_command(
        TARGET ${PROJECT_NAME}
        POST_BUILD
        COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E make_directory "${IM_OUTPUT_FOLDER}"
        COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_if_different
            "$<TARGET_FILE:${PROJECT_NAME}>" "${IM_OUTPUT_FOLDER}"
        VERBATIM
    )
endif()
